name: Country Beef and Rice
recipeIngredient: 2 cups (1/2 pkg.) Frozen broccoli, Corn and red bell peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a skillet until crisp. Remove bacon and set aside.
2. Brown beef with onion in hot drippings in skillet; drain fat.
3. Add vegetables, soup, water, and garlic powder.
4. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer 1 minute.
5. Stir in bacon and rice. Cover; remove from heat.
6. Let stand 5 minutes.
Makes 4 servings.
